name: assetmason-cli
description: Installed CLI for public AssetMason Agent Resource Planning workflows.

scripts.build: node ../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --declaration --outDir dist --rootDir src src/index.ts src/main.ts src/commands.ts src/errors.ts
